__prompts__.project_name: Human-readable app name (shown in the dashboard title)
__prompts__.project_slug: Folder/package name (auto-derived from project_name; press Enter to accept)
__prompts__.client_id: SMART client_id issued by your EHR when you register this app (Medplum issues a UUID like the default shown; Epic uses its own format). Don't have it yet? Enter a placeholder now and set the real value later in .env (SMART_CLIENT_ID)
__prompts__.jhe_base_url: JupyterHealth Exchange base URL the app reads data from (e.g. https://jhe.fly.dev)
__prompts__.smart_scopes: SMART scopes to request during EHR launch (space-separated)
__prompts__.ehr_iframe_origin: Web origin of the EHR that embeds this app in an iframe, for the CSP. Defaults to Medplum (app.medplum.com); change it if you use a different EHR
__prompts__.mrn_identifier_system: The FHIR Patient.identifier 'system' that holds the MRN. Set this SAME value as the identifier system on the patient in your EHR
